subject: large shaggy antlered beast-like figure holding a white rose, with a slender human figure in the background
description: A large, broad-shouldered creature covered in shaggy brown fur and natural foliage, with prominent antlers growing from its head, stands near a wooden surface holding a single white rose delicately. A vase of flowers sits nearby. In the background to the left, a slender humanoid figure stands in profile, seemingly unaware or indifferent. The creature's posture is gentle despite its bulk, suggesting tenderness. The color palette is muted blue-grey and brown, lending a quiet, melancholy atmosphere.
foreground: large shaggy antlered beast holding white rose near flowers
background: pale blue-grey interior, slender human figure to left
emotion: tender longing, gentle despite monstrous form
